top_signals.title: Israel Won't Have A Say In How The Iran War Ends Says Miller
top_signals.summary: Aaron David Miller, a senior fellow at the Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, joined Balance of Power to discuss the latest developments from the Iran War. He said he thinks Israel is not going to have much say in how the Iran war ends. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Illinois Passes $56B Budget as Bears Deal Stalled
top_signals.summary:
Bloomberg's Shruti Singh joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." Illinois legislators early Monday morning passed a nearly $56 billion budget for the fiscal year starting July 1, aiming to ease higher health-care and housing costs while bracing for potential federal funding cuts.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Being Selective in Credit is 'Critical': Pier
top_signals.summary: Sonali Pier, portfolio manager: multi-sector credit at PIMCO, and Meghan Robson, head of US credit strategy at BNP Paribas, join Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." US investment-grade bond sales reached $1 trillion sooner than in any year since 2020 as historically low spreads and a spending surge on artificial intelligence fuel borrowing by blue-chip companies. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Ships stranded in Persian Gulf quietly coordinate with U.S. Navy to exit Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Clashes erupted between the U.S. and Iran over commercial ships earlier this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bloomberg Economics Previews Friday's US Jobs Report
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg Economics chief US economist Anna Wong joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Coinbase to launch token-backed mortgage down payments this summer
top_signals.summary: A Coinbase-Better Home & Finance initiative will allow qualified borrowers to use Bitcoin and USDC as collateral for home loan down payments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Investors can 'buy' SpaceX early with Coinbase perpetual futures on pre-IPOs
top_signals.summary: Pre-IPO perps give traders the ability to speculate on the value of a private company without owning shares.

top_signals.title: U.S. natural gas storage capacity increased slightly in 2025
top_signals.summary: Underground working natural gas storage capacity in the Lower 48 states increased slightly in 2025, according to our latest data, with growth concentrated in the South Central and Mountain regions. Underground natural gas storage provides a source of energy when demand increases, balancing U.S. energy needs. We calculate natural gas storage capacity in two ways: demonstrated peak capacity and working gas design capacity. Both increased in 2025.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
